widgetData.source_sentence: Tom Bodett happiness hope joy love wishing
sentences: “i have accepted fear as part of life â€“ specifically the fear of change... i have gone ahead despite the pounding in the heart that says: turn back....”
“they love their hair because they're not smart enough to love something more interesting.”
“they say a person needs just three things to be truly happy in this world: someone to love, something to do, and something to hope for.”
“if i were not a physicist, i would probably be a musician. i often think in music. i live my daydreams in music. i see my life in terms of music.”
“i loved her against reason, against promise, against peace, against hope, against happiness, against all discouragement that could be.”
“after a good dinner one can forgive anybody, even one's own relations.”
“not everything is about you," clary said furiously."possibly," jace said, "but you do have to admit that the majority of things are.”
“i love you as certain dark things are loved, secretly, between the shadow and the soul.”

“mom. i have something to tell you. iâ€™m undead. now, i know you may have some preconceived notions about the undead. i know you may not be comfortable with the idea of me being undead. but iâ€™m here to tell you that undead are just like you and me â€¦ well, okay. possibly more like me than you.”

widgetData.source_sentence: George Bernard Shaw animals friends humor vegetarianism
sentences: “you pierce my soul. i am half agony, half hope...i have loved none but you.”
“cry. forgive. learn. move on. let your tears water the seeds of your future happiness.”
“animals are my friends...and i don't eat my friends.”
“many people will walk in and out of your life, but only true friends will leave footprints in your heart”
“i, myself, am made entirely of flaws, stitched together with good intentions.”
“respect was invented to cover the empty place where love should be.”
